CRM_Feature: The specific feature of the MediConn Solution CRM system being discussed.
Usage_Rate: The percentage of staff making use of the specific CRM feature.
Survey_Date: The date when the survey was conducted to determine the usage rate of the CRM feature.
Potential_Impact: Description of how the underutilized CRM feature could potentially impact the company, such as improving employee satisfaction.
Impact_Target_Year: The year by which the potential impact of using the CRM feature is expected to be realized.

Allows for accessing the CRM system from mobile devices, which can improve accessibility
Helps in reaching out to customers through emails, which can increase customer engagement

Helps in predicting upcoming sales trends, which can enhance revenue
